messages: Scotty is currently herding virtual sheep... Please wait while he rounds them up!

Hold on, Scotty is corralling the data into place.
Scotty is on patrol, ensuring your experience is secure.
Fetching the latest updates... Scotty is on the chase!

Scotty is chasing bugs away to bring you a smoother experience.

Scotty saw a suspicious 404 error and is barking it away!
Guard mode activated! Scotty is making sure only the best data gets through.
Scotty is herding all the bits and bytes into formation!

Scotty is on duty, ensuring this page loads faster than a squirrel escape!
Scotty is conducting a full security sweep. No unauthorized data allowed!

Scotty won't let the page load until he's certain it's intruder-free!
Scotty is tracking down every missing pixel before we continue!
Scotty chased the data a little too far... Reeling it back now!
Milo heard the word 'walk' and dashed off! He'll be back with your content shortly.

Milo is on his daily walk, collecting the freshest content for you.

Milo is leading the way, guiding you to the next page.
Milo's excitement for walks is matched only by his eagerness to load your content!
